zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Derby於1545年出生在英國多瑟特阿斯可斯維爾時，他的父親Robert Derby II33歲，母親Mrs. Robert Derby II31歲。他於大約1570年與Catherine Buckler在英國英格蘭多瑟特阿斯可斯維爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1599年10月30日在英國英格蘭多瑟特享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特伯頓 布拉德斯托可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Derby于1545年出生在英国多瑟特阿斯可斯維爾时，他的父亲Robert Derby II33岁，母亲Mrs. Robert Derby II31岁。他于大约1570年与Catherine Buckler在英国英格兰多瑟特阿斯可斯維爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1599年10月30日在英国英格兰多瑟特享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特伯頓 布拉德斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: Derby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Darby
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Derby, the county seat of Derbyshire, but also from the much smaller place called West Derby in Lancashire. Both are named from Old Norse djúr ‘deer’ + bȳ ‘farm, settlement’. This form of the surname represents the pronunciation of both the placename and the surname.

Irish: adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó Diarmada (or Mac Diarmada) ‘descendant (or ‘son’) of Diarmaid’, a personal name meaning ‘freeman’. See also Dermott , McDermott . Gaelic Ó Duibhdhiormaigh was sometimes reinterpreted as Ó Diarmada, and Darby could also be an Anglicized form of this name. The English surname is also established in Ireland, having been taken to County Leix in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Derby was born in 1545, in Askerswell, Dorset, England, his father, Robert Derby II, was 33 and his mother, Mrs. Robert Derby II, was 31. He married Catherine Buckler about 1570, in Askerswell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 30 October 1599, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Burton Bradstock, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Derby est né en 1545, à Askerswell, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Robert Derby II, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert Derby II, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Buckler environ 1570, à Askerswell, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 30 octobre 1599, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Burton Bradstock, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Derby 1545 in Askerswell, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Derby II 33 und seine Mutter Mrs. Robert Derby II 31. Er hat um 1570 in Askerswell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Catherine Buckler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Oktober 1599 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Burton Bradstock, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Derby è nato il nel 1545 nel Askerswell, Dorset, England, il suo padre, Robert Derby II, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Robert Derby II, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Buckler circa 1570, nel Askerswell, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 ottobre 1599, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Burton Bradstock, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Derbyが1545年にイギリスドールセトアスケルスウエルで生まれた時，父Robert Derby IIは33歳，母Mrs. Robert Derby IIは31歳であった。約1570年にイギリスイギリスドールセトアスケルスウエルでCatherine Bucklerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1599年10月30日にイギリスイギリスドールセトで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトブルトン ブラドストックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Derby(이)가 1545년 영국 도르세트 아스커스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Derby II(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Robert Derby II(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1570년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 아스커스웰에서 Catherine Buckler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1599년 10월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 버턴 브라드스톡에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Derby nasceu em 1545, em Askerswell, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Derby II, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Robert Derby II, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Buckler aproximadamente 1570, em Askerswell, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de outubro de 1599, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Burton Bradstock, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Derby родился в 1545 г. в местности аскирсвелл, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Derby II было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert Derby II, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Buckler около 1570 г. в местности аскирсвелл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 30 октября 1599 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности буртон брадстокк, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
